From: Chris Dallow <Chris.Dallow@moorecap.co.uk> Sent: 03 November 2025 12:17To: Charles River Support <CharlesRiverSupport@moorecap.com>Cc: Operations - London FI <Operations-Londonfi@moorecap.co.uk>Subject: FRAs being modified
 
Hi CR
 
Looks like when we are unwinding/assigning FRA trades, the delivery and maturity dates are being modified. Please see below example from this morning:
 

 
Initially we would have had this security booked with maturity date of 26th Nov 2025 and the delivery date as 26th Feb 2026, however it looks like the process of assigning has amended these dates to 5th Dec 2025 and 5th March 2026:
 

 
Please urgently investigate
 
Many thanks
 
Chris
